questions.question: Describe the main difference between Remote Procedure Call (RPC) and Remote Method Invocation (RMI). Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the fundamental characteristics of both concepts

questions.question: Explain the concept of request-reply protocols in the context of Remote Invocation. How do they facilitate communication between client and server in a distributed system?
questions.hint: Consider an example protocol like RMI-IIOP or CORBA

questions.question: What is the primary advantage of using Remote Method Invocation (RMI) over traditional RPC? Provide a scenario where RMI would be preferred over RPC.
questions.hint: Focus on the benefits of RMI in terms of simplicity and flexibility
